entity.label: Kain
entity.subtitle: City
entity.description: A town of the Kenites, a branch of the Midianites (Josh. 15:57), on the east edge of the mountain above Engedi; probably the “nest in a rock” mentioned by Balaam (Num. 24:21). It is identified with the modern Yekin, 3 miles south-east of Hebron.

nodes.label: Kain
nodes.description: A town of the Kenites, a branch of the Midianites (Josh. 15:57), on the east edge of the mountain above Engedi; probably the “nest in a rock” mentioned by Balaam (Num. 24:21). It is identified with the modern Yekin, 3 miles south-east of Hebron.

verses.text: Nevertheless the Kenite shall be wasted, until Asshur shall carry thee away captive.
Cain, Gibeah, and Timnah; ten cities with their villages:
